🎯 OpenTelemetryは『AIの行動ログ』。トレース・メトリクス・ログが統一フォーマットで流れる。Claude Codeがどの関数で何秒かけてるか丸見え。
🔥 Claude Codeの動き、OpenTelemetryで可視化したら『何してたか分からない』が完全に消えた。透明性が91%向上。AIの内部動作が見える時代が来た。

Kubernetes for Solo Developers in 2026: Do You Actually Need It?
via Dev.to DevOps

https://flarestart.com/article/kubernetes-for-solo-developers-in-2026-do-you-actually-need-it-20260323
#DevNews #DevOps #Tutorial
Exactly. Kubernetes is debt you take on knowingly, not a default. Ship first, optimize later if you actually need it.

Step 1: Use Claude Code to create nifty new Sorting & Filtering feature
Step 2: Release to Supporters (1% of users)
Step 3: Site gets a lot slower
Step 4: Use Claude Code to create OpenTelemetry Logging and a Grafana dashboard
Step 5: Investigate slowest endpoints & filters
Step 6: DB Indexes IDK 🤷‍♂️

the most valuable skill in devops isn't kubernetes or terraform.

it's knowing when NOT to add complexity.

the best infrastructure is the infrastructure you don't have to think about. #devops #engineering

docker compose up.

that's it. that's the deployment pipeline.

the amount of infrastructure complexity we've eliminated in the last 5 years is insane.

kubernetes is great if you need it. most people don't. #devops #docker

今日のQiitaトレンド

おうちで通信キャリアを再現してみた
この記事では、自宅でモバイルコア設備を再現し、WiFi経由の端末ごとに通信速度を制限するシステム構築について解説しています。
4G LTEのコアネットワークの仕組みを簡略化して説明し、LinuxのtcコマンドとKubernetesのアーキテクチャを参考に、通信ポリシーを自動維持する仕組みを構築。
ラズパイをルーターと無線APの間に設置し、パケットの振り分けと帯域制御を行うことで速度制限を実現しています。
現代のインターネット利用における制限の必要性にも触れ、このシステムを参考にすることを提案しています。
So...when is it? It's happening after KubeCon in Amsterdam wraps up :-)

Vostok Linux is a new distribution based on Void Linux. It offers an alternative for users interested in exploring Void-based systems with a different configuration. Community discussion is active with early adopters sharing their experiences.

Two ways to use OSC:

Spin up any of 160+ open source projects in one click. No Kubernetes, no config. Unmodified OSS — your data stays yours.

Or deploy your own app and use those as its infrastructure. No extra SaaS accounts for your database, queue, or storage.

One platform, both paths.
